proven.claim: Proven: "--dry-run" is documented in help (line 555) and consumed by
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 555
; Proven: "--dry-run" is documented in help (line 555) and consumed by
; args.includes("--dry-run") in runAnalyze, which passes dryRun to fileIssues().
(declare-const dryrun_documented Int)
(declare-const dryrun_consumed Int)
(assert (= dryrun_documented 1))
; const dryRun = args.includes("--dry-run"); used to control fileIssues behavior
(assert (= dryrun_consumed 1))
(assert (not (= dryrun_documented dryrun_consumed)))
(check-sat)
; Expected: unsat — --dry-run is documented and controls filing behavior
